subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-25
subcodes.first_line: In reality there has been and there will ever be only one religion and that is the religion of Truth, one faith and that is the faith of Love. All other things are non-essentials.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @spiritual transformation, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @universality of the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion
